mechanics.excerpt: Freeborn warriors can choose To Serve and Protect instead_ Scientist caste characters can choose Civilian Job or Postgraduate Studies; technicians can choose Civilian Job or serve 0n the front lines Tour of Duty: Clan; most mer- chants will follow the Free Trader Path but can also choose Civilian Job; and aborer caste characters toil away at the Civilian Job Path, with no other prospects_ Mandatory Subpath: Other Majors University Path required Create your Own major using the following guidelines Tlme: years Skllls: Academic / Any Relevant 4 add any two skills: Choose three: Academic / Any +3, Acting Art / Any Relevant +3, Administration Career / Any Relevant Computers +2, Language; Any +3 or Training +3 Events: Do not roll events for Other Majors Next Path: Civilian Job (4), Ne'er-Do-Well (4), Postgraduate Studies (41 Subpath: Medical School Sciences Major required Tlme: years Attribute Minimums: DEX WIL Skllls: Add +1 to any three skills Flelds: Doctor Next Path: Civilian Job (4), Ne'er-Do-Well (4), Postgraduate Studies (4).
